title: The Laziest Way to Make Money With AI (No Code)
description: In this video, I'm calling out one of the biggest AI myths: using a few cool apps won't magically transform your business. As a CEO and investor in billion-dollar AI companies, I'll show you what actually works, building an AI-powered flywheel that generates leads, closes deals, delivers products, and runs on its own.
